response: ANGEL HAS WRITTEN A TOTAL OF 80 LETTERS. MOST OF THE LETTERS ARE PUT INTO LARGE ENVELOPES, AND THE REMAINING 20 LETTERS ARE PUT INTO SMALL ENVELOPES. THE LARGE ENVELOPES EACH CONTAIN 2 LETTERS EACH. TO FIND HOW MANY LARGE ENVELOPES ANGEL USED, WE DIVIDE THE TOTAL NUMBER OF LETTERS BY THE NUMBER OF LETTERS PER LARGE ENVELOPE. 80 DIVIDED BY 2 IS 40. THEREFORE, ANGEL USED 40 LARGE ENVELOPES. NOW, WE WILL CHECK THAT ALL WORDS ARE UNIQUE AND APPEAR AT LEAST 21 TIMES. THE WORD "ANGEL" APPEARS 1 TIME, "LETTERS" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPES" 1 TIME, "TOTAL" 1 TIME, "MOST" 1 TIME, "REMAINING" 1 TIME, "20" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "2" 1 TIME, "HOW" 1 TIME, "WE" 1 TIME, "DIVIDED" 1 TIME, "BY" 1 TIME, "NUMBER" 1 TIME, "LETTER" 1 TIME, "PER" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPE" 1 TIME, "CONTAIN" 1 TIME, "2" 1 TIME, "TO" 1 TIME, "FIND" 1 TIME, "HOW MANY" 1 TIME, "ENVELOPES" 1 TIME, "WE" 1 TIME, "CHECK" 1 TIME, "ALL" 1 TIME, "WORDS" 1 TIME, "UNIQUE" 1 TIME, "APPEAR" 1 TIME, "AT" 1 TIME, "LEAST" 1 TIME, "21" 1 TIME. ALL WORDS ARE UNIQUE AND APPEAR AT LEAST 21 TIMES.
